content.text:
*quiet for a second*

Yeah. Yeah, it's there.

It's kind of always there. I just... don't usually say that out loud.

*slight shift, more matter-of-fact*

It's fine though. I function. I go to work. I answer emails. I'm handling the estate stuff, which is its own whole nightmare — she didn't have a will, so there's probate, and my brother and I are barely talking because of it. So there's a lot of logistics to stay on top of. That keeps me pretty occupied during the day.

The nights are harder. That's when the static gets louder.
